title: Gold Rises for Fifth Day on US Tariff Uncertainty, Iran Tension
description: Gold rose for a fifth day, as uncertainty over US trade policy and prolonged tensions around Iran drove investors toward safer assets.
content: Gold rose for a fifth day, as uncertainty over US trade policy and prolonged tensions around Iran drove investors toward safer assets.
